record.text: If you're curious about group chats and haven't seen the announcement, check it out here: bsky.app/profile/bsky...

images.alt: A group chat staffed entirely by the Bluesky team's pets, who are very excited to tell each other that group chats now exist.

value.text:
What's up, chat!

Group chats are rolling out today in the new v1.124 update.

This is our first feature built for communities, and there's more to come.

images.alt: A group chat staffed entirely by the Bluesky team's pets, who are very excited to tell each other that group chats now exist.
A demonstration of someone scanning a Bluesky profile QR code.

record.text:
Along with group chats, we've rolled out a new way to share your profile and invite friends to find you on Bluesky.

Check your profile — you'll see a new share button. You can use this to create a personalized QR code other people can scan to more easily find (and hopefully follow) you.

images.alt: A demonstration of someone scanning a Bluesky profile QR code.
A demonstration of someone scanning a Bluesky profile QR code.

record.text: This is just the first step for group chats and communities on Bluesky. We're going to be evolving this with your feedback. Let us know what you think!

images.alt: A group chat staffed entirely by the Bluesky team's pets, who are very excited to tell each other that group chats now exist.

record.text:
What's up, chat!

Group chats are rolling out today in the new v1.124 update.

This is our first feature built for communities, and there's more to come.

images.alt: A group chat staffed entirely by the Bluesky team's pets, who are very excited to tell each other that group chats now exist.

record.text: We know many of you want to send media in DMs and group chats. We couldn't include that in today's release, but we think it's a super valuable feature. We'll need to build new safety and moderation systems before we can add it.

We know many of you want to send media in DMs and group chats. We couldn't include that in today's release, but we think it's a super valuable feature. We'll need to build new safety and moderation systems before we can add it.

images.alt: A group chat staffed entirely by the Bluesky team's pets, who are very excited to tell each other that group chats now exist.

record.text:
What's up, chat!

Group chats are rolling out today in the new v1.124 update.

This is our first feature built for communities, and there's more to come.

images.alt: A group chat staffed entirely by the Bluesky team's pets, who are very excited to tell each other that group chats now exist.

record.text:
As a chat participant, you decide who can invite you to Group Chats: everyone, only people you follow, or no one. 

This setting defaults to "only people you follow" or whichever you've already set for DMs.

Invitations appear in your chat request inbox where you can approve or ignore them.

As a chat participant, you decide who can invite you to Group Chats: everyone, only people you follow, or no one. 

This setting defaults to "only people you follow" or whichever you've already set for DMs.

Invitations appear in your chat request inbox where you can approve or ignore them.

images.alt: A group chat staffed entirely by the Bluesky team's pets, who are very excited to tell each other that group chats now exist.

record.text:
What's up, chat!

Group chats are rolling out today in the new v1.124 update.

This is our first feature built for communities, and there's more to come.

images.alt: A group chat staffed entirely by the Bluesky team's pets, who are very excited to tell each other that group chats now exist.
A demonstration of how you can generate an invite link for a group chat, and how it appears when embedded in a post.

record.text:
As the group chat creator, you can manage the chat however you like. You're in control of the privacy options, and you decide who's in or out. 

You can also generate an invite link and share it anywhere — including in Bluesky posts, where it will get a nice embedded card.

images.alt: A demonstration of how you can generate an invite link for a group chat, and how it appears when embedded in a post.
A demonstration of how you can generate an invite link for a group chat, and how it appears when embedded in a post.

items.alt: We've increased the number of photos you can attach to a post from 4 to 10. That's why we're adding a carousel.

The carousel only shows for posts with at least 5 photos.
Old posts with photos will continue to show the regular grid layout.
Each photo displays a numbered badge to make it super clear there are more photos to browse.
We've improved the gesture handling so you don't accidentally open the drawer menu or go back/forward in your browser while swiping.
We're always eager to hear your feedback. Let us know your thoughts about the new carousel!

record.text:
v1.123 is live! You can now attach up to 10 photos in posts. 

We listened to your feedback and redesigned the photo carousel. It only appears for posts with at least 5 photos. 

Swipe through to learn more.

items.alt: We've increased the number of photos you can attach to a post from 4 to 10. That's why we're adding a carousel.

The carousel only shows for posts with at least 5 photos.
Old posts with photos will continue to show the regular grid layout.
Each photo displays a numbered badge to make it super clear there are more photos to browse.
We've improved the gesture handling so you don't accidentally open the drawer menu or go back/forward in your browser while swiping.
We're always eager to hear your feedback. Let us know your thoughts about the new carousel!

record.text: Pssst: We bumped the video upload limit from 100MB to 300MB to make posting bigger videos easier.

Going live soon? Give it a try: click the "..." button on your profile and choose "Go live." 

Let us know what live platforms you'd like to see added next!

ICYMI: You can now go live on Bluesky with YouTube, Substack and beehiiv, in addition to the already-supported platforms: Twitch, Streamplace and Bluecast Add your stream link and a red ring appears on your avatar, so your followers know the moment you’re on. 🧵
When you're live, your Bluesky profile photo links people straight to wherever you're streaming. No extra steps required.
When you're live, your Bluesky profile photo links people straight to wherever you're streaming. No extra steps required.

ICYMI: You can now go live on Bluesky with YouTube, Substack and beehiiv, in addition to the already-supported platforms: Twitch, Streamplace and Bluecast Add your stream link and a red ring appears on your avatar, so your followers know the moment you’re on. 🧵

ICYMI: You can now go live on Bluesky with YouTube, Substack and beehiiv, in addition to the already-supported platforms: Twitch, Streamplace and Bluecast Add your stream link and a red ring appears on your avatar, so your followers know the moment you’re on. 🧵

ICYMI: You can now go live on Bluesky with YouTube, Substack and beehiiv, in addition to the already-supported platforms: Twitch, Streamplace and Bluecast Add your stream link and a red ring appears on your avatar, so your followers know the moment you’re on. 🧵
The release also includes a rebuilt GIF picker, a refreshed photo viewer, expanded moderation labeling at the account level, and a fix for a bug that was silently dropping some iOS video uploads.

record.text: This is part of our ongoing work to make Bluesky a great place to connect with the rest of the Atmosphere. We’re pleased to see others recently investing in making the same connections. WordPress now offers a plugin that lets any WP site publish to the network as well.

external.description: Standard.site provides shared lexicons for long-form publishing on AT Protocol. Making content easier to discover, index, and move across the ATmosphere.
external.title: Standard.site - One schema. Every platform.

record.text:
What is Standard.site? Think of it as a file format for publishing longer posts from blogs, news sites…wherever. If you’re using Leaflet, pckt.blog, or Offprint, you’re already using Standard.site!

https://standard.site/

My visitor badge. Thousands of employees marching around as I stare in amazement.

value.text:
Recently I had the amazing- and yet very bizarre- experience of going to Xbox HQ as a visitor. I had been invited by Asha, who is very cool it turns out, to have a hike and hang out a bit. I’ll probably talk more about that another time.

But first let’s talk about microorganisms.

images.alt: The front of one of several huge buildings that somehow exist as a result of an idea on a red eye flight. Fucking hell.
My visitor badge. Thousands of employees marching around as I stare in amazement.

record.text:
Keep it private! 

We’re adding more ways to connect with other Atmosphere apps. You can now launch Germ’s E2E encrypted messaging from Bluesky profiles. Check out @germnetwork.com for more.

record.text: We hear and appreciate your feedback on the photo carousel. We're going to put it back in the oven for now. We'll consider bringing it back for posts with more than four photos (or videos) when we add support for that.

v1.121 is live!

We've increased the quality of photos in posts by doubling the max file size to 2MB and the resolution limit to 4000x4000. 

Plus, posts with multiple photos now appear in a carousel so you can show off your photography in all its glory.

record.text: The application has remained stable since the evening of April 16 and we have seen no evidence of unauthorized access to private user data. Given the ongoing stability, this will be our final update.

Bluesky is looking for a design research contractor

big plus if you know Bluesky well

who's the best design researcher you know? nominate them (or yourself)

The application has remained stable since approximately 9 PM PDT, April 16 despite ongoing Distributed Denial-of-Service (DDoS) attacks.
We have not seen any evidence of unauthorized access to private user data.
We will provide our next update on or before the morning of April 20.

The application has remained stable since approximately 9 PM PDT, April 16 despite ongoing Distributed Denial-of-Service (DDoS) attacks. We have not seen any evidence of unauthorized access to private user data. We will provide a further update by end of day.
We will provide an update no later than 10am PDT, April 17.

Our team received a report of intermittent app outages at about 11:40pm PDT on April 15, 2026.  They worked through the night to mitigate a sophisticated Distributed Denial-of-Service (DDoS) attack, which intensified throughout the day.
The attack is impacting our application, with users experiencing intermittent interruptions in service for their feeds, notifications, threads and search.
The attack is impacting our application, with users experiencing intermittent interruptions in service for their feeds, notifications, threads and search.

We have not seen any evidence of unauthorized access to private user data.
We have not seen any evidence of unauthorized access to private user data.

Our team received a report of intermittent app outages at about 11:40pm PDT on April 15, 2026.  They worked through the night to mitigate a sophisticated Distributed Denial-of-Service (DDoS) attack, which intensified throughout the day.
We are experiencing some service interruptions and our team is working on the issue. You can find the latest updates at status.bsky.app or follow @status.bsky.app.

record.text:
v1.120 is live!

On web, you can now search without your mouse! Press "/" to focus on the search field, and use your up/down keys to move through the results.

Up/down also works when you mention someone with "@" in a post.

We also fixed bugs like feeds not refreshing and threads jumping on scroll.
We've launched an official Japanese account! Give it a follow if you're interested in more Japan-specific information.

images.alt: Bluesky日本語公式アカウント（@jp.bsky.app）のプロフィール画面スクリーンショット。

value.text:
日本のBlueskyユーザーの皆さん、こんにちは！👋
英語以外の言語として初の、日本語公式アカウントを開設しました。

今後、 @bsky.app などの投稿の翻訳、日本向けの告知などを行っていく予定です。

ぜひこの投稿をリポストして、多くの方にこのアカウントを知っていただけるようご協力ください。

images.alt: Bluesky日本語公式アカウント（@jp.bsky.app）のプロフィール画面スクリーンショット。

record.text: We're improving our recommendations for people to follow on Bluesky. As this ramps up, you should start seeing more relevant suggestions across the app.

value.text:
over the weekend, @iwsmith.bsky.social's team rolled out a new version of the "suggested for you" interstitial on profiles that recommends accounts to follow. 

follows nearly tripled. should be a noticeable improvement for many of you. 

still room to improve, ofc. let us know if you have feedback!

record.text:
I wrote about why @knightfoundation.org invested in 
@bsky.app: philanthropy can act when mission & opportunity align. We believe in @jay.bsky.team's vision for a better social web—& in ideas (like @masnick.com's) that grow out of the research ecosystem Knight has long supported. kf.org/kfbluesky

In April 2025, Bluesky raised $100 million in Series B funding led by Bain Capital Crypto. Since our Series A, we've grown from 13 million to over 43 million global users.
external.title: Bluesky's 2025 $100M Series B Lays Foundation for Open Social Web - Bluesky

value.text: Last April, we raised $100M in Series B funding. This round gives us the ability to scale our team to meet the rapid growth of Bluesky and the AT Protocol. Read more: bsky.social/about/blog/0...

external.title: Bluesky's 2025 $100M Series B Lays Foundation for Open Social Web - Bluesky
external.description: In April 2025, Bluesky raised $100 million in Series B funding led by Bain Capital Crypto. Since our Series A, we've grown from 13 million to over 43 million global users.

record.text: Thank you to our lead, @baincapitalcrypto.com, as well as @alumniventures.bsky.social, Anthos Capital, Bloomberg Beta, @knightfoundation.org and @trueventures.com.

external.description: In April 2025, Bluesky raised $100 million in Series B funding led by Bain Capital Crypto. Since our Series A, we've grown from 13 million to over 43 million global users.
external.title: Bluesky's 2025 $100M Series B Lays Foundation for Open Social Web - Bluesky

record.text: Last April, we raised $100M in Series B funding. This round gives us the ability to scale our team to meet the rapid growth of Bluesky and the AT Protocol. Read more: bsky.social/about/blog/0...

record.text:
To mark your account as automated, go to Settings → Account → Automation label

For now, bot labels are voluntary, and all existing policies continue to apply. We may introduce additional policies specific to automated accounts in the future.

images.alt: A screenshot demonstrating how bot labels appear on profiles in the Bluesky app.

record.text:
v1.119 is live!

Bot labels are here. If you run an automated account, you can now mark it as such in your account settings. The label will show up on your profile and posts so people know what's a bot and what's not.

images.alt: A screenshot demonstrating how bot labels appear on profiles in the Bluesky app.
A screenshot demonstrating how bot labels appear on profiles in the Bluesky app.
